# Monorepo Best Practices

> Proven patterns for pnpm workspaces, Turborepo, and shared package architecture.

## Entries

- [pnpm + Turborepo Monorepo Structure](pnpm-turborepo-structure.md): pnpm workspaces for packages, Turborepo for task orchestration, layered dependency hierarchy. RECOMMENDED.
- [Shared Packages with Barrel Exports and Layer Dependencies](shared-packages-pattern.md): @namespace/ prefixed packages with barrel exports and numbered layer enforcement. RECOMMENDED.
